verses.text: Tu-in Kumpi David teekin kum tam ta hi. Amaute in amah puan a silhsak uh hangin a khua lum theilo hi

Tua ahih ciangin a nasemte in ama kiangah, “Ka to kumpipa-a' dingin nungakno khat kizong hen la, amah in kumpipa enin amah a kemnu hita hen. Ka to kumpipa a khua a lum theihna dingin na ang sungah tuanu lum hen,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Israel gamsung khempeuhah nungak melhoih khat zong uh a, Shunem mi Abishag mu-in, kumpipa kiangah amah paipih uh hi
Tua nungak melhoih mahmah a, kumpipa a kemnu suakin ama na a sem hi. A lupkhawm uh hangin kumpipa in amah hih zolo hi.

Tu-in David in Haggith tawh a neih a tapa Adonijah amahmah kiliansak tawmin, “Keimah, kumpi ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in ama-a' dingin leengte leh sakol tung tuangte, leh ama mai-ah a tai ding mihing sawmnga vaihawm hi
A pa David in, “Bang hangin tua bang tua bangin gamta na hi hiam?” ci-a dotna tawh khatvei beek amah tai ngeilo hi. Amah pen a melhoih mahmah mi khat zong ahi hi. Amah pen Absalom zoma suak ahi hi
Amah in Zeruiah' tapa Joab leh siampi Abiathar tawh vaihawm hi. Amaute in Adonijah zui-in amah pan'pih uh hi
Ahih hangin siampi Zadok, leh Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah, leh David' mi a thahatte in Adonijah pan'pihlo uh hi
Adonijah in Enrogel gei-a om Gulpi' Suangpi kiangah tuute, bawngtalte, leh ganno thaute biakna-in pia-in, amah in kumpipa' tapate ahi a sanggamte khempeuh leh Judah gam kumpi uliante khempeuh sam a
ahih hangin kamsangpa Nathan ahi a, Benaiah ahi a, mi thahatte ahi a, a sanggampa Solomon ahi zongin samlo hi
Tua ciangin Nathan in Solomon' nu Bathsheba kiangah, “Haggith' tapa Adonijah kumpi suak khinin, David in tua thu a theihlohna thu za nailo na hi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in hong pai in. Nangma nuntakna leh na tapa Solomon' nuntakna na suahtaksak theihna dingin nang tungah ngaihsutna kong pia ding hi

Thakhatin Kumpi David kiangah pai-in ama tungah, ‘Ka to kumpipa in na nasemnu' tungah hong kiciamin, “Na tapa Solomon pen keima nungah maangin, keima kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,” ci hilo na hi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Adonijah kumpi suak ahi hiam?’ ci in
Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah thu na gen laitakin kei zong nangma nungah hong pai-in nangma thugen teng kong pan'pih ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Bathsheba a inndei sung kumpipa kiangah va pai hi (tu-in kumpipa teek mahmah a, Shunem mi Abishag in kumpipa' na sem hi
Bathsheba kunin kumpipa tungah zahtakna bawl a, kumpipa in, “Bang deih na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tuanu in ama kiangah, “Ka topa aw, na nasemnu tungah Topa na Pasian' min tawh kiciamin, ‘Na tapa Solomon pen keima nungah maangin, keima kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ na ci hi
Tu-in en in, ka to kumpipa in na theihloh hangin, Adonijah kumpi ahi hi
Amah in biakna-in bawngtalte, ganno thaute, leh tuute, tampi tak pia khin a, kumpipa' tapate khempeuh, siampi Abiathar, leh galkapte a ukpa Joab sam a, ahih hangin amah in na nasempa Solomon samlo hi
Ka to kumpipa aw, tu-in nangma nungah ka to kumpipa' tokhom tungah kua tu ding, ci-a amaute kiangah na gen ding ngakin Israel-te khempeuh in nang hong en uh hi
Tua bang hi kei leh ka to kumpipa na bei ciangin kei leh ka tapa Solomon a khialin a hong kiseh hun hong tung ding hi,” a ci hi
Kumpipa tawh tuanu kiho-in a om laitakin kamsangpa Nathan hong tum hi
Kumpipa kiangah, “Hih lai-ah kamsangpa Nathan om hi,” ci-in a kigen hi. Kumpipa mai-ah amah hong pai ciangin a mai leilam ngatin kumpipa' mai-ah a kun hi
Tua ciangin Nathan in, “Ka to kumpipa aw, ‘Keima nungah Adonijah maangin ka kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ ci na hi hiam

Bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in amah paisuk khinin, bawngtalte, ganno thaute, leh tuute, tampi tak biakna-in pia a, kumpipa' tapate khempeuh, galkapte a ukpa Joab, leh siampi Abiathar sam hi. Amaute in ama-a' ding pawi bawl uh a, ‘Kumpi Adonijah a khan' sau hen!’ ci uh hi
Ahih hangin na nasempa keimah, leh siampi Zadok, leh Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah, leh na nasempa Solomon, amah in hong samlo hi
Ka to kumpipa in hih thu thukimpihin, nangma khit ciangin ka to kumpipa' tokhom tungah kua tu ding cih thu na nasem kote' kiangah hong im na hi hiam?” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Kumpi David in dawngin, “Bathsheba ka kiangah hong samkik in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa omna-ah tuanu hong pai-in, kumpipa' mai-ah a ding hi
Kumpipa kiciamin, “Haksatna khempeuh panin kei a hong honkhia Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin

nangma tungah Topa, Israel Pasian' min tawh hong kiciamin, ‘Keima nungah ka tapa Solomon maang ding a, keima tangin ka kumpi tokhom tungah tu ding hi,’ ka cihsa mah bangin, tuni-in zong ka cikik hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Bathsheba in leilam maingatin kunin kumpipa tungah zahtakna bawl a, “Ka to kumpi David nungta tawntung ta hen!” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi David in siampi Zadok, kamsang Nathan, leh Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah samsak hi. Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa' mai-ah amaute hong pai uh hi
Kumpipa in amaute kiangah, “Na topa' nasemte paipih un la, ka tapa Solomon keima la-sakol tungah tuangsakin Gihon-ah paipihsuk un
Israel-te' tungah kumpi-in tua lai munah siampi Zadok leh kamsang Nathan sathau nilhsak un. Tua ciangin peengkul tum un la, ‘Kumpi Solomon khan'sau hen!’ ci un

Tua ciangin ama nungah note nong pai ding uh a, amah hong pai-in ka kumpi tokhom tungah hong tu ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keima tangin amah kumpi hi ding hi. Israel leh Judah a ukpa dingin amah ka seh khinzo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah in dawngin, “Hi ta hen! Topa, ka to kumpipa' Pasian in tua bangin kipsak ta hen
Topa in ka to kumpipa a ompih mah bangin Solomon zong ompih hen la, ka to Kumpi David' tokhom sangin ama tokhom lianzaw sak hen,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Zadok, kamsang Nathan, Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah, leh Khereth mite leh Peleth mite paisukin Kumpi David' la-sakol tungah Solomon tuangsak uh a, Gihon-ah amah paipih uh hi
Tua lai-ah siampi Zadok in puanbuk panin sathau biing la-in Solomon a nilh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in peengkul tum uh hi. Tua ciangin mi khempeuh in, “Kumpi Solomon khan'sau hen!” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh ama nungah pai-in tamngaikop tum uh a, nakpi takin lungdam uh a, amau' gamlumna in lei a thawnkham hi

Adonijah leh amah tawh a om leenglate khempeuh in a pawi bawl a man khit uh ciangin hih thu za uh hi. Joab in peengkul aw a zak ciangin amah in, “Khuapi sungah hih gamlumna bang a cihnopna ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Amah a kampau laitakin, siampi Abiathar' tapa Jonathan hong pai hi. Tua ciangin Adonijah in, “Hong tum in; bang hang hiam cih leh nang migina na hi a, thuhoih nong puak hi,” a ci hi
Jonathan in Adonijah dawngin, “Hilo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh i to kumpi David in kumpi-in Solomon bawl khin hi
Kumpipa in amah tawh siampi Zadok, kamsang Nathan, leh Jehoiada' tapa Benaiah, leh Khereth mite leh Peleth mite sawl khin hi. Amaute in kumpipa' la-sakol tungah amah tuangsak khin uh hi
Siampi Zadok leh kamsang Nathan in Gihon-ah kumpi-in amah sathau nilh khin uh hi. Tua lai panin amaute lungdamin ciahkhin uh ahih manin khuapi sung gamlum hi. Nangma zak pen hih gamlumna ahi hi
Tu-in Solomon in kumpi tokhom luah khinta hi

Tua thamloin kumpipa' nasemte i to Kumpi David tungah lungdamna a ko dingin pai uh a, ‘Na Pasian in nangma min sangin Solomon' min a thangzaw-in bawl hen la, nangma tokhom sangin ama tokhom a lianzaw-in bawl ta hen,’ ci uh hi. A lupna tung panin kumpipa mahmah zong kun hi
Kumpipa in zong, ‘Keima mit-a ka muhin keima suanlekhakte khat ka kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin tuni-in a pia Topa, Israel Pasian in thupha ngah ta hen,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Adonijah' leenglate khempeuh ling uh a, dingin amau' mun ciatah a ciah uh hi
Tua ciangin Adonijah in Solomon kihta hi. Amah pai-in biakna tau kite pom hi

Tua ciangin Solomon kiangah, “Adonijah in Kumpi Solomon hong kihta hi. Amah in biakna tau kite lenin, ‘Amah in a nasempa namsau tawh a thahlohna ding kei tungah Kumpi Solomon hong kiciam masa hen,’ ci hi,” kici hi
Tua ciangin Solomon in, “Amah in a kilawm mi ahihna a lahtel theih leh ama samzang khat zong leilakah kialo ding a, ahi zongin ama sungah gitlohna a kimuh leh amah si ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Kumpi Solomon in mi sawl a, amaute in zong biakna tau panin amah paikhiatpih uh hi. Amah hong pai-in Kumpi Solomon' tungah zahtakna bawl hi. Tua ciangin Solomon in ama kiangah, “Na inn-ah ciah in,” a ci hi.
